items.headline: Is Albemarle (ALB) One of the 10 Dividend Stocks with Low Payout Ratios and Strong Upside Potential?
items.snippet: On June 18, Citi upgraded Albemarle Corporation (NYSE:ALB) to Buy from Neutral. Price target unchanged at $225. Analyst Patrick Cunningham said the company is well-positioned to benefit from structural lithium demand tailwinds. Citi remains skeptical that the lithium market will

items.headline: Lithium mining stocks broadly fall, U.S. Albemarle down over 4%
items.snippet: On Thursday, lithium mining stocks broadly fell: Albemarle (ALB.US) down over 4%, SQM (SQM.US) down 3%.

items.headline: Does Albemarles Premium Valuation Justify Buying the Stock Now?
items.snippet: ALB expects lithium demand CAGR of 10-20% from 2025 to 2030. Global ESS production rising 117% YoY in Q1 2026. Higher lithium prices driven by strong EV and ESS demand.

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: RBC raised PT to $257 from $253, reiterated Outperform. Expects 2026 and 2027 EBITDA of $2.8B and $2.9B. Lithium supply expected to remain tight through 2027.
